action_set_definitions.name: get_loan_application_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core metadata and applicant ID associated with a specific loan request.

loan_id.description: The unique identifier for the loan application.

action_set_definitions.name: get_credit_bureau_report
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches external credit history and risk scores for a specific applicant.

applicant_id.description: The unique identifier for the applicant/borrower.

action_set_definitions.name: get_agricultural_operational_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time biological asset health (mortality) and crop production data for the borrower.

loan_id.description: The loan ID to correlate with specific farm operations.

action_set_definitions.name: get_risk_policy_standards
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the Handbook of Agricultural Credit Risk Management for specific underwriting thresholds.

category.description: The policy category to retrieve standards for.

example_output.standard_description: Maximum allowable YTD mortality for swine operations.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_pricing_data
action_set_definitions.description: Provides current market prices for commodities to assist in breakeven and margin calculations.

commodity.description: The name of the crop or livestock (e.g., 'Corn', 'Soybeans').

action_set_definitions.name: submit_underwriting_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final credit decision and formal report to the system.

analysis_report.description: Detailed justification covering crop margin and biological health.

covenants.description: Required insurance adjustments or monitoring requirements.

state_description.applicant_data: Comprehensive internal records of the loan applicant, including identity, income, and employment history.
state_description.credit_bureau_records: External-simulated credit history, including historical defaults, current credit lines, and credit scores.
state_description.application_metadata: Details of the current loan request, such as amount, purpose, and term duration.
state_description.verification_status: Internal flags tracking which parts of the application (e.g., identity, income) have been successfully verified.
state_description.system_risk_config: Global parameters used for risk simulation, such as minimum score thresholds or current market interest rates.
